contents:
(** * Cocones *)

(** A Cocone over a diagram [D] to a type [X] is a family of maps from the types of [D] to [X] making the triangles formed with the arrows of [D] commuting. *)
Arguments Build_Cocone {G D X} legs legs_comm.
Arguments legs {G D X} C i x : rename.
Arguments legs_comm {G D X} C i j g x : rename.

Definition issig_Cocone {G : Graph} (D : Diagram G) (X : Type)
  : _ <~> Cocone D X := ltac:(issig).
(** [path_cocone] says when two cocones are equal (up to funext). *)

Definition path_cocone_naive {C1 C2 : Cocone D X}
    (P := fun q' => forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
      q' j (D _f g x) = q' i x)
    (path_legs : legs C1 = legs C2)
    (path_legs_comm : transport P path_legs (legs_comm C1) = legs_comm C2)
    : C1 = C2 :=
    match path_legs_comm in (_ = v1)
      return C1 = {|legs := legs C2; legs_comm := v1 |} 
    with
      | idpath => match path_legs in (_ = v0)
        return C1 = {|legs := v0; legs_comm := path_legs # (legs_comm C1) |}
      with
        | idpath => 1
      end
    end.

Definition path_cocone {C1 C2 : Cocone D X}
    (path_legs : forall i,  C1 i == C2 i)
    (path_legs_comm : forall i j g x,
      legs_comm C1 i j g x @ path_legs i x
      = path_legs j (D _f g x) @ legs_comm C2 i j g x)
    : C1 = C2.

goals.conclusion: C1 = C2

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, C1 i == C2 i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
legs_comm C1 i j g x @ path_legs i x =
path_legs j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm C2 i j g x

goals.conclusion: C1 = C2

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, C1 i == C2 i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
legs_comm C1 i j g x @ path_legs i x =
path_legs j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm C2 i j g x

contents: destruct C1 as [legs pp_q], C2 as [r pp_r].

goals.conclusion: {| legs := legs; legs_comm := pp_q |} = {| legs := r; legs_comm := pp_r |}

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => legs j ((D _f g) x)) == legs i
forall i : G, D i -> X
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (fun x : D i => r j ((D _f g) x)) == r i

{| legs := legs; legs_comm := pp_q |} i ==
{| legs := r; legs_comm := pp_r |} i

path_legs j ((D _f g) x) @
legs_comm {| legs := r; legs_comm := pp_r |} i j g x

path_legs j ((D _f g) x) @
legs_comm {| legs := r; legs_comm := pp_r |} i j g x

contents: (** Given a cocone [C] to [X] and a map from [X] to [Y], one can postcompose each map of [C] to get a cocone to [Y]. *)

Definition cocone_postcompose (C : Cocone D X) {Y : Type}
    : (X -> Y) -> Cocone D Y.

goals.conclusion: (X -> Y) -> Cocone D Y
(X -> Y) -> Cocone D Y
Cocone D Y
D i -> Y

forall (j : G) (g : G i j),
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) j o D _f g == (fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) i

forall (j : G) (g : G i j),
(fun i0 : G => f o C i0) j o D _f g == (fun i0 : G => f o C i0) i
f (C j ((D _f g) x)) = f (C i x)

contents: exact (ap f (legs_comm _ i j g x)).

(** ** Universality of a cocone. *)

  (** A colimit will be the extremity of a universal cocone. *)

  (** A cocone [C] over [D] to [X] is said universal when for all [Y] the map [cocone_postcompose] is an equivalence. In particular, given another cocone [C'] over [D] to [X'] the inverse of the map allows to recover a map [h] : [X] -> [X'] such that [C'] is [C] postcomposed with [h]. The fact that [cocone_postcompose] is an equivalence is an elegant way of stating the usual "unique existence" of category theory. *)
(** We now prove several functoriality results, first on cocone and then on colimits. *)

(** ** Postcomposition for cocones *)

  (** Identity and associativity for the postcomposition of a cocone with a map. *)

Definition cocone_postcompose_identity {D : Diagram G} `(C : Cocone _ D X)
    : cocone_postcompose C idmap = C.

goals.conclusion: cocone_postcompose C idmap = C
cocone_postcompose C idmap = C
cocone_postcompose C idmap i == C i

forall (j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose C idmap) i j g x @
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) i x =
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm C i j g x

forall (j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose C idmap) i j g x @
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) i x =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm C i j g x
ap idmap (legs_comm C i j g x) @ 1 = 1 @ legs_comm C i j g x

Definition cocone_postcompose_comp {D : Diagram G}
             `(f : X -> Y) `(g : Y -> Z) (C : Cocone D X)
    : cocone_postcompose C (g o f)
      = cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) g.

goals.conclusion: cocone_postcompose C (g o f) = cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) g
cocone_postcompose C (g o f) = cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) g

cocone_postcompose C (g o f) i ==
cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) g i

forall (j : G) (g0 : G i j) (x : D i),
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose C (g o f)) i j g0 x @
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) i x =
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) j ((D _f g0) x) @
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) g) i j g0 x

forall (j : G) (g0 : G i j) (x : D i),
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose C (g o f)) i j g0 x @
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) i x =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) j ((D _f g0) x) @
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) g) i j g0 x

ap (fun x0 : X => g (f x0)) (legs_comm C i j h x) @ 1 =
1 @ ap g (ap f (legs_comm C i j h x))

contents:
(** ** Precomposition for cocones *)

  (** Given a cocone over [D2] and a Diagram map [m] : [D1] => [D2], one can precompose each map of the cocone by the corresponding one of [m] to get a cocone over [D1]. *)

Definition cocone_precompose {D1 D2: Diagram G} (m : DiagramMap D1 D2) {X}
    : (Cocone D2 X) -> (Cocone D1 X).

goals.conclusion: Cocone D2 X -> Cocone D1 X
Cocone D2 X -> Cocone D1 X
Cocone D1 X
D1 i -> X

forall (j : G) (g : G i j),
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) j o D1 _f g == (fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) i

forall (j : G) (g : G i j),
(fun i0 : G => C i0 o m i0) j o D1 _f g == (fun i0 : G => C i0 o m i0) i
C j (m j ((D1 _f g) x)) = C i (m i x)
C j (m j ((D1 _f g) x)) = ?Goal
?Goal = C i (m i x)
C j (m j ((D1 _f g) x)) = ?Goal
m j ((D1 _f g) x) = ?y
?y = m j ((D1 _f g) x)
C j ((D2 _f g) (m i x)) = C i (m i x)

contents: (** Identity and associativity for the precomposition of a cocone with a diagram map. *)

Definition cocone_precompose_identity (D : Diagram G) (X : Type)
    : cocone_precompose (X:=X) (diagram_idmap D) == idmap.

goals.conclusion: cocone_precompose (diagram_idmap D) == idmap
cocone_precompose (diagram_idmap D) == idmap
forall i : G, (fun x : D i => C i x) == C i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
(1 @ legs_comm C i j g x) @ ?Goal i x =
?Goal j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm C i j g x

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D i),
(1 @ legs_comm C i j g x) @ (fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) i x =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D i0) => 1) j ((D _f g) x) @ legs_comm C i j g x
(1 @ legs_comm C i j g x) @ 1 = 1 @ legs_comm C i j g x

Definition cocone_precompose_comp {D1 D2 D3 : Diagram G}
    (m2 : DiagramMap D2 D3) (m1 : DiagramMap D1 D2) (X : Type)
    : (cocone_precompose (X:=X) m1) o (cocone_precompose m2)
      == cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m2 m1).

goals.conclusion:
cocone_precompose m1 o cocone_precompose m2 ==
cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m2 m1)

cocone_precompose m1 o cocone_precompose m2 ==
cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m2 m1)

cocone_precompose m1 (cocone_precompose m2 C) =
cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m2 m1) C

forall i : G,
cocone_precompose m1 (cocone_precompose m2 C) i ==
cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m2 m1) C i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D1 i),
legs_comm (cocone_precompose m1 (cocone_precompose m2 C)) i j g x @
?path_legs i x =
?path_legs j ((D1 _f g) x) @
legs_comm (cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m2 m1) C) i j g x

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D1 i),
legs_comm (cocone_precompose m1 (cocone_precompose m2 C)) i j g x @
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D1 i0) => 1) i x =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D1 i0) => 1) j ((D1 _f g) x) @
legs_comm (cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m2 m1) C) i j g x

contents: (** Associativity of a precomposition and a postcomposition. *)

Definition cocone_precompose_postcompose {D1 D2 : Diagram G}
             (m : DiagramMap D1 D2) `(f : X -> Y) (C : Cocone D2 X)
    : cocone_postcompose (cocone_precompose m C) f
      = cocone_precompose m (cocone_postcompose C f).

goals.conclusion:
cocone_postcompose (cocone_precompose m C) f =
cocone_precompose m (cocone_postcompose C f)

cocone_postcompose (cocone_precompose m C) f =
cocone_precompose m (cocone_postcompose C f)

cocone_postcompose (cocone_precompose m C) f i ==
cocone_precompose m (cocone_postcompose C f) i

forall (j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D1 i),
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose (cocone_precompose m C) f) i j g x @
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) i x =
(fun i0 : G => ?Goal@{i:=i0}) j ((D1 _f g) x) @
legs_comm (cocone_precompose m (cocone_postcompose C f)) i j g x

forall (j : G) (g : G i j) (x : D1 i),
legs_comm (cocone_postcompose (cocone_precompose m C) f) i j g x @
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D1 i0) => 1) i x =
(fun (i0 : G) (x0 : D1 i0) => 1) j ((D1 _f g) x) @
legs_comm (cocone_precompose m (cocone_postcompose C f)) i j g x

ap f (ap (C j) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @ legs_comm C i j g (m i x)) @ 1 =
1 @
(ap (fun x0 : D2 j => f (C j x0)) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @
 ap f (legs_comm C i j g (m i x)))

ap f (ap (C j) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @ legs_comm C i j g (m i x)) =
ap (fun x0 : D2 j => f (C j x0)) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @
ap f (legs_comm C i j g (m i x))
ap f (ap (C j) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @ legs_comm C i j g (m i x)) = ?Goal

?Goal =
ap (fun x0 : D2 j => f (C j x0)) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @
ap f (legs_comm C i j g (m i x))
ap f (ap (C j) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @ legs_comm C i j g (m i x)) = ?Goal

ap f (ap (C j) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^) @ ap f (legs_comm C i j g (m i x)) =
ap (fun x0 : D2 j => f (C j x0)) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ @
ap f (legs_comm C i j g (m i x))

ap f (ap (C j) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^) =
ap (fun x0 : D2 j => f (C j x0)) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^

ap (fun x0 : D2 j => f (C j x0)) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^ =
ap f (ap (C j) (DiagramMap_comm m g x)^)

contents: (** The precomposition with a diagram equivalence is an equivalence. *)

#[export] Instance cocone_precompose_equiv {D1 D2 : Diagram G}
    (m : D1 ~d~ D2) (X : Type) : IsEquiv (cocone_precompose (X:=X) m).

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (cocone_precompose m)
IsEquiv (cocone_precompose m)
Cocone D1 X -> Cocone D2 X
cocone_precompose m o ?g == idmap
?g o cocone_precompose m == idmap
cocone_precompose m o cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) == idmap
cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) o cocone_precompose m == idmap
cocone_precompose m o cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) == idmap
cocone_precompose m (cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) C) = C
cocone_precompose m (cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) C) = ?Goal
?Goal = C
cocone_precompose m (cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) C) = ?Goal
cocone_precompose (diagram_comp (diagram_equiv_inv m) m) C = C
cocone_precompose (diagram_idmap D1) C = C
cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) o cocone_precompose m == idmap
cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) (cocone_precompose m C) = C
cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) (cocone_precompose m C) = ?Goal
?Goal = C
cocone_precompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) (cocone_precompose m C) = ?Goal
cocone_precompose (diagram_comp m (diagram_equiv_inv m)) C = C
cocone_precompose (diagram_idmap D2) C = C

contents: (** The postcomposition with an equivalence is an equivalence. *)

#[export] Instance cocone_postcompose_equiv {D : Diagram G} `(f : X <~> Y)
    : IsEquiv (fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f).

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f)
IsEquiv (fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f)
Cocone D Y -> Cocone D X
(fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f) o ?g == idmap
?g o (fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f) == idmap

(fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f)
o (fun C : Cocone D Y => cocone_postcompose C f^-1) == idmap

(fun C : Cocone D Y => cocone_postcompose C f^-1)
o (fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f) == idmap

(fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f)
o (fun C : Cocone D Y => cocone_postcompose C f^-1) == idmap
cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f^-1) f = C
cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f^-1) f = ?Goal
?Goal = C
cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f^-1) f = ?Goal
?Goal = cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f^-1) f
cocone_postcompose C (fun x : Y => f (f^-1 x)) = C
cocone_postcompose C (fun x : Y => f (f^-1 x)) = ?Goal
?Goal = C
cocone_postcompose C (fun x : Y => f (f^-1 x)) = cocone_postcompose C idmap
(fun x : Y => f (f^-1 x)) = idmap

(fun C : Cocone D Y => cocone_postcompose C f^-1)
o (fun C : Cocone D X => cocone_postcompose C f) == idmap
cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) f^-1 = C
cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) f^-1 = ?Goal
?Goal = C
cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) f^-1 = ?Goal
?Goal = cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f) f^-1
cocone_postcompose C (fun x : X => f^-1 (f x)) = C
cocone_postcompose C (fun x : X => f^-1 (f x)) = ?Goal
?Goal = C
cocone_postcompose C (fun x : X => f^-1 (f x)) = cocone_postcompose C idmap
(fun x : X => f^-1 (f x)) = idmap

contents:
(** ** Universality preservation *)

  (** Universality of a cocone is preserved by composition with a (diagram) equivalence. *)

goals.conclusion: UniversalCocone (cocone_precompose m C)
UniversalCocone (cocone_precompose m C)
IsEquiv (cocone_postcompose (cocone_precompose m C))

contents: rewrite (path_forall _ _ (fun f => cocone_precompose_postcompose m f C)).

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (fun f : X -> Y => cocone_precompose m (cocone_postcompose C f))

contents:
#[export] Instance cocone_postcompose_equiv_universality {D: Diagram G} `(f: X <~> Y)
    (C : Cocone D X) (_ : UniversalCocone C)
    : UniversalCocone (cocone_postcompose C f).

goals.conclusion: UniversalCocone (cocone_postcompose C f)
UniversalCocone (cocone_postcompose C f)
IsEquiv (cocone_postcompose (cocone_postcompose C f))

contents: rewrite <- (path_forall _ _ (fun g => cocone_postcompose_comp f g C)).

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (fun g : Y -> Y0 => cocone_postcompose C (fun x : X => g (f x)))
